text:
Without doubt the advent of social media has changed the way athletes feel, behave and perform both in their normal lives and during competitions.While social media brings excitement, to some athletes it has made them fall into depression due to the pressure and insensitive comments from their fans on Facebook, Instagram, X and other platforms.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Why mental health won't be an issue for Team Kenya at Olympics
author: Rodgers Eshitemi
description: NOC-K has entered into partnership with Chiromo Hospital Group to help work on athletes' mental health.
keywords: ["NOC-K","National Olympic Committee of Kenya","Francis Mutuku","Chiromo Hospital"]
